docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAHIROVIC, JASMINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAHIROVIC, JASMINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STUBBLEFIELD, RICHARD $715.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $780.00, COURT FINDS THAT TENANT AND LANDLORD NEGOTIATED A "NO CHARGE" FOR EARLY DEPARTURE FROM LEASE IF TENANT WAS ABLE TO FIND NEW TENANT. COURT FINDS THAT TENANT PROCURED NEW TENANT AT HIGHER RENT AND SHOULD NOT BE CHARGED FOR EARLY TERMINATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED DEC-05-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STUBBLEFIELD, RICHARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JASMINA ZAHIROVIC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHARD STUBBLEFIELD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAHIROVIC, JASMINA AS TO DEFENDANT STUBBLEFIELD, RICHARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ZAHIROVIC, JASMINA AS TO DEFENDANT STUBBLEFIELD, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2020 - JUDGMENT.
